sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19574" key="baskeutai/" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βασκευταί·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φασκίδες, ἀγκάλαι,</foreign> Id.:—also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάσκιοι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεσμαὶ φρύγανων,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάσκιλλος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κίσσα,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάσκον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χῶρον,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
